active.title: withProviders pulls full ecommerce stack including Stripe + Payload ecommerce client
active.body: Tests rendering Header via withProviders fail with v8 OOM unless @payloadcms/plugin-ecommerce/client/react and /payments/stripe are mocked. Mock both EcommerceProvider (children passthrough) and useCart, plus stripeAdapterClient.

active.title: container.querySelectorAll('header nav > ul > li') is a robust assertion for nav structure
active.body: Direct child selector with > is stable across className changes. N+1 li count assertion catches order regressions.

active.title: Snapshot tests with radix UI components drift on every run
active.body: Radix `aria-controls=radix-_r_X_` ids are non-deterministic. Snapshot diff shows _r_d_ → _r_17_ even on no-op. Either drop snapshot tests for components using radix, or normalize ids in custom serializer.

active.title: ADD --quick mode fills config defaults blindly (e.g. npm run dev) without inspecting package.json
active.body: After /add:init --quick, .add/config.json had run='npm run dev' but project script was `start: next dev`. Full /add:init or /add:init --reconfigure detects from package.json. Recommend always reconfigure after quick init for non-trivial projects.
